name: Fried Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the potato into pieces, about 1/4 inch by 1/2 inch.
2. Melt the margarine in a frying pan over campfire or stove.
3. Add the potatoes, seasoning, and salt to the melted margarine.
4. Stir or turn the potatoes regularly (about once every 5 minutes), adjusting based on cooking temperature, until they are golden brown.
5. Remove from heat and serve immediately. They can also be served cold.
